TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u Beijing ( Hulam a kamu : 北京 ) sasayaway akenis i Asia (Ya-cuo 亞洲) a kanatal u Cuo-kuo atu Cuo-kuo hamin nu kitaki a cenci, manamec, nulangaw atu lawa'dan. u Beijing sa i labu nu Asia (Ya-cuo 亞洲), itiza i 39°54′24″N 116°23′51″E. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 16,410.5 pinhuwankungli , u ahebal nu nanumay sa te'kuk ku 0 pinhuwankungli. hamin nu tademawan sa 21,893,095, u yadah nu tademaw makaala tu 1,300 pinhuwankungli nu tademaw. misademiaday kakitizaan sakakikalisiwan macacubelisay binacadan
S.PHON: u bəijiŋ ( ħur~ɾam a kamu : ** ) sasajawaj akənis i asia (ja-ʦuo **) a kanatar~ɾ u ʦuo-kuo atu ʦuo-kuo ħamin nu kitaki a ʦənʦi, manaməʦ, nur~ɾaŋaw atu r~ɾawaʔ~ʡdan. u bəijiŋ sa i r~ɾabu nu asia (ja-ʦuo **), itiza i *********n **********ə. u aħəbar~ɾ nu r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡaj sa izaw ku **,***.* pinħuwankuŋr~ɾi , u aħəbar~ɾ nu nanumaj sa təʔ~ʡkuk ku * pinħuwankuŋr~ɾi. ħamin nu tadəmawan sa **,***,***, u jadaħ nu tadəmaw makaar~ɾa tu *,*** pinħuwankuŋr~ɾi nu tadəmaw. misadəmiadaj kakitizaan sakakikar~ɾisiwan maʦaʦubər~ɾisaj binaʦadan
S.FORM: u Beijing ( Hulam a kamu : 北京 ) sasayaway akenis i Asia (Ya-cuo 亞洲) a kanatal u Cuo-kuo atu Cuo-kuo hamin nu kitaki a cenci, manamec, nulangaw atu lawa'dan. u Beijing sa i labu nu Asia (Ya-cuo 亞洲), itiza i 39°54′24″N 116°23′51″E. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 16,410.5 pinhuwankungli , u ahebal nu nanumay sa te'kuk ku 0 pinhuwankungli. hamin nu tademawan sa 21,893,095, u yadah nu tademaw makaala tu 1,300 pinhuwankungli nu tademaw. misademiaday kakitizaan sakakikalisiwan macacubelisay binacadan
